items.example: When you join our company, you'll receive a number of job perks.
The usual employee benefits include a regular salary and paid holiday.
We offer equal pay for all staff so everyone doing the same job is paid the same.
All employees are entitled to twenty-five days of paid holiday per year.
The company offers excellent health insurance that covers all medical needs.
Our pension scheme will help provide a good standard of living when you retire.
New mothers can take a month's extra maternity leave on top of the national requirement.

items.translation: отпуск по уходу за ребёнком (для отца)
items.example: Fathers are also offered paternity leave to spend time with their babies.

items.translation: уход за детьми (детский сад при компании)
items.example: We have on-site childcare so parents can leave their children close by.
There are further financial incentives as we know extra money can be motivating.
Our end-of-year bonus scheme gives staff a percentage of their annual salary.
We offer tuition assistance to anyone taking a course related to their work.
There is a mentor programme for new members of staff.
